cms.task_text: Naprogramujte želvu tak, aby nakreslila [hlp]tři vodorovné čáry[/hlp] nad sebou. Každá čára je [hlp]dlouhá 80 pixelů[/hlp] a má [hlp]jinou tloušťku[/hlp]: první tloušťku 1, druhou 5 a třetí 10. Mezi čarami [hlp]zvedněte pero[/hlp], přesuňte se o 30 pixelů dolů a pero znovu spusťte.
cms.start_blocks_xml: <xml xmlns="https://developers.google.com/blockly/xml"><block type="turtle_set_pen_width" x="30" y="30"><field name="WIDTH">1</field></block><block type="turtle_forward" x="120" y="30"><field name="DISTANCE">80</field></block><block type="turtle_pen_up" x="210" y="30"></block><block type="turtle_right" x="30" y="110"><field name="ANGLE">90</field></block><block type="turtle_forward" x="120" y="110"><field name="DISTANCE">30</field></block><block type="turtle_left" x="210" y="110"><field name="ANGLE">90</field></block><block type="turtle_pen_down" x="30" y="190"></block><block type="turtle_set_pen_width" x="120" y="190"><field name="WIDTH">5</field></block><block type="turtle_forward" x="210" y="190"><field name="DISTANCE">80</field></block><block type="turtle_pen_up" x="30" y="270"></block><block type="turtle_right" x="120" y="270"><field name="ANGLE">90</field></block><block type="turtle_forward" x="210" y="270"><field name="DISTANCE">30</field></block><block type="turtle_left" x="30" y="350"><field name="ANGLE">90</field></block><block type="turtle_pen_down" x="120" y="350"></block><block type="turtle_set_pen_width" x="210" y="350"><field name="WIDTH">10</field></block><block type="turtle_forward" x="30" y="430"><field name="DISTANCE">80</field></block></xml>
cms.spravna_odpoved_xml: <xml xmlns="https://developers.google.com/blockly/xml"><block type="turtle_set_pen_width" x="50" y="50"><field name="WIDTH">1</field><next><block type="turtle_forward"><field name="DISTANCE">80</field><next><block type="turtle_pen_up"><next><block type="turtle_right"><field name="ANGLE">90</field><next><block type="turtle_forward"><field name="DISTANCE">30</field><next><block type="turtle_left"><field name="ANGLE">90</field><next><block type="turtle_pen_down"><next><block type="turtle_set_pen_width"><field name="WIDTH">5</field><next><block type="turtle_forward"><field name="DISTANCE">80</field><next><block type="turtle_pen_up"><next><block type="turtle_right"><field name="ANGLE">90</field><next><block type="turtle_forward"><field name="DISTANCE">30</field><next><block type="turtle_left"><field name="ANGLE">90</field><next><block type="turtle_pen_down"><next><block type="turtle_set_pen_width"><field name="WIDTH">10</field><next><block type="turtle_forward"><field name="DISTANCE">80</field></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></xml>
